task_objective: Update pyludusavi to 0.2.1 and switch to log_show
design_decisions: Updated pyludusavi to 0.2.1 while preserving project-specific patches for Flatpak discovery.
Switched log retrieval to use the library's native log_show() method.
Updated log_show() in the vendored pyludusavi to support the new ludusavi_rCURRENT.log filename format.
Refactored SDH-ludusavi adapters to use get_log_contents() instead of get_log_path().
results: pyludusavi updated to 0.2.1 and log retrieval refactored to use log_show(). All tests passing.
